author: pasevin
description: Minimal, monotone Mermaid diagrams with a larger pan / zoom viewer. Designed for the baseline theme. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: pasevin
manifest.description: Minimal, theme-aware Mermaid diagrams with a larger pan / zoom viewer.
manifest.name: Slick Mermaid

name: Slick Mermaid

releases.author: pasevin
releases.description:
## New

- **Keyboard zoom in fullscreen** — press `+`/`=` to zoom in, `-`/`_` to zoom out. Anchors to the center of the stage, consistent with double-click-to-fit.

## Fixes

- Resolve Obsidian eslint-plugin lint issues for community plugin compliance:
  - Use `setCssProps` with camelCase keys instead of kebab-case string literals
  - Use `activeDocument` instead of `document` for popout window compatibility
  - Use `.instanceOf()` instead of `instanceof` for cross-window safe type checking
  - Remove unnecessary type assertions

Contributed by @MawCeron (#8).

releases.author: pasevin
releases.description:
## New

- **Keyboard zoom in fullscreen** — press `+`/`=` to zoom in, `-`/`_` to zoom out. Anchors to the center of the stage, consistent with double-click-to-fit.

## Other

- Fullscreen hint text updated to reflect the new keyboard shortcut.

Contributed by @MawCeron (#8).

releases.author: pasevin
releases.description:
## Fixes

- **Mermaid load on restart** — resolve Obsidian theme CSS variables to computed colors and pass hex-only `themeVariables` so `mermaid.initialize` no longer fails on `calc()` / `hsl()` values.
- **Journey diagrams** — theme section header bands (`Register`, `Verify`, etc.) with the chart palette instead of Mermaid’s hardcoded midnight/purple fills.

## Other

- Plugin stays enabled if the Mermaid patch fails at load time.
- README screenshots and YouTube demo links updated.

**Full restart** (quit Obsidian, not just reload) recommended after updating.

releases.author: pasevin
releases.description:
Initial release of Slick Mermaid.

Highlights:
- Baseline-native monotone Mermaid styling for Obsidian
- Disables Baseline's Mermaid SVG invert filter
- Themes flowcharts, ER table rows, labels, edges, and common Mermaid shapes
- Normalizes common unquoted flowchart labels before Mermaid parses them
- Adds a larger dialog with fitted default view, pan, and wheel zoom
releases.name: Slick Mermaid 0.1.0
